examples: She called the verdict a victory of truth over falsehood.
When people uttered a falsehood, the scientists noticed a burst of activity in their amygdala.
Not only that, but when people faced no consequences for dishonesty, their falsehood tended to get even more sensational.
The law didn't criminalize all lying, just "a calculated, factual falsehood" about oneself, said Mr. Verrilli.
But their truth or falsehood makes little difference if you hold gold in your physical possession.
